text: Alternative Income board indicates preference for AEW UK REIT plc's proposed bid over Glenstone's formal offer.
Prologis discloses third indicative offer - which has been rejected by Segro

n: Railways Pension Trustee Company increases indicative offer from 69.7p to 71.6p plus CVR
text: Railways Pension Trustee Company increases indicative offer from 69.7p to 71.6p plus CVR
